root.sql: SELECT sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_account_no , pka_com_function.fp_form_depno(sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_account_no) as deposit_account_no_form , sc_dep_m_creditor.membership_no , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_dep_m_creditor.membership_no) as member_name , sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_account_name , sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_balance , sc_dep_m_creditor.close_status , sc_dep_m_creditor.member_status , sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_closing_date , sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_type_code , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sysdate , 'SD MONTH YYYY') as systdate FROM sc_dep_m_creditor WHERE 1=1 /*WHERE*/ --and sc_dep_m_creditor.membership_no between :as_memfirst and :as_memlast order by sc_dep_m_creditor.membership_no , sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_account_no
